title: Spear SMP
body:
Introducing the Official Spear SMP Mod!

This mod introduces a collection of 8 specially crafted custom spears, each boasting three tiers of abilities. Killing players earns you valuable Spear XP, and as your Spear XP grows, your spear will level up to the next tier of power.

Each spear begins at its most basic tier, offering the worst ability. Progressing to the second tier get you a better ability, however, it's still relatively modest. Reaching the maximum spear xp will unlock the third and final tier. This will transform you into a powerful force, similar to a demigod. In this ultimate tier, your spear will have amazing abilities, allowing you to effortlessly beat your fellow players in combat.
